question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Based on the percentage labels, which statement is correct?

options.A: Huawei has the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.B: Samsung has the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.C: Apple and Others together account for more than 20% of the market.
options.D: Xiaomi has a larger share than Samsung.

explanation: From the labels, Huawei has the highest share (87%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Huawei is largest when relying on visual comparison.
